global.description: The ad features a stylish man promoting a flash sale with bold text and a discount badge.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with significant discounts on bestsellers.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Stylish man in suit
elements.description: A well-dressed man in a tailored suit, sitting confidently with arms crossed, exuding professionalism.

elements.label: Flash sale live
elements.description: Bold, attention-grabbing text in a modern font, prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers now
elements.description: A smaller, inviting text below the headline, encouraging viewers to explore popular products.

elements.label: 30% discount
elements.description: A circular badge with a bold percentage, indicating a significant discount, placed at the bottom.

elements.label: Claim reward
elements.description: A prominent button with inviting text, designed to encourage user interaction, located in the center.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A sleek and modern logo at the top, representing the brand, designed to be easily recognizable.
